message:
feat: Experience level gating for overlay hotkeys

Implements progressive disclosure of keyboard shortcuts based on user
experience level (novice/intermediate/power). This prevents novice users
from accidentally triggering advanced analysis features while still
allowing them to discover and upgrade when ready.

Changes:
- Add ExperienceLevel type and minLevel to HotkeyDefinition
- Add hotkey_blocked event for blocked hotkey notifications
- Extend KeyboardManager to check experience level before triggering
- Add useExperienceLevelSync hook to sync store level to keyboard manager
- Add useBlockedHotkeyNotification hook for gentle UX notifications
- Create BlockedHotkeyToast component with upgrade prompt

Overlay hotkey gating applied:
- Power level: Anomaly, HGT, Bias Decomposition, Phase Portrait,
  Structure Constraints, Non-B-DNA, Defense Arms Race, AMG Pathway,
  Codon Adaptation
- Intermediate level: CGR, Dot Plot, Hilbert Curve, Protein Domains

When a user attempts a gated hotkey, they see a toast explaining the
feature is locked and offering to upgrade their experience level.

Closes phage_explorer-n0rn

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
